current_position.after_stage4_api_freeze: Stage 4 API contract is frozen for the first Stage 5 frontend scaffold.
current_position.after_stage5_report_polish: Stage 5 now has operation-specific result visualization and report export ergonomics for JSON, CSV, Markdown, and backend bundles.
current_position.after_stage5_ux_depth: Stage 5 now has richer trajectory inspection, explicit exported parameter provenance, and a guided MLCI public trajectory workflow that can be reproduced from CLI and the frozen upload route.
current_position.after_stage5_upload_parity: Stage 5 now has real CSV upload-flow hardening, visible parameter/schema inspection, and CLI/API/frontend parity audits for all six frozen contract operations.
current_position.after_v0_3_x: Stage 3 case-study evidence bank is satisfied for the current v0.3 gate.
current_position.next_stage_not_active_until: Stage 6 begins only after the Stage 5 workbench can reproduce backend results from the frozen contract and the release surfaces pass together.

non_drift_rules: RhoDyn is a general method for dynamic operating-state analysis in live-cell perturbation biology.
RhoDyn is not a reproduction pipeline for the RhoA/microglia manuscript.
The manuscript and Zenodo data remain an optional reference use case.
Stage 3 public examples teach what residence, buffering, bounded coupling, and routed outputs reveal beyond amplitude-only summaries.
Stage 4 backend work must delegate to stable Python library functions.
Stage 7 method evidence can expand the biological systems but should not reopen the Stage 3 closure unless a Stage 3 defect is found.
Stage 8 cannot reshape the Nature Methods evidence path.
Stage 5 frontend work must consume the frozen Stage 4 API contract.
purpose: Roadmap execution memory for the original Stage 3 to Stage 8 blueprint.

gate: At least two biological systems show a residence/amplitude distinction.
At least one case shows bounded coupling or reserve logic.
Examples do not imply RhoDyn generated the original manuscript results.
stage_lock.name: Case-study evidence bank
stage_lock.scope_rule: Keep the evidence bank stable. Additional public biological systems are Stage 7 evidence expansion unless they repair a documented Stage 3 defect.

gate: Every backend result matches the Python library output exactly.
No hidden state outside explicit durable job storage.
Jobs preserve input schema, parameter choices, software version, and bundle hashes.
Frozen OpenAPI, frontend contract, and fixtures are committed for Stage 5.
stage_lock.name: Backend
stage_lock.scope_rule: Treat the committed OpenAPI schema, frontend contract, fixtures, and closeout document as the Stage 5 dependency. Reopen Stage 4 only for documented contract defects.

stage_lock.current_gate: Deepen the contract-bound frontend around trajectory inspection, export provenance, and one guided public workflow before moving to full workbench polish.
gate: A biologist can upload a tidy table and interpret amplitude-like versus residence-like behavior without reading code.
A quantitative user can inspect every parameter and reproduce the result from CLI.
The workbench consumes the frozen Stage 4 API contract rather than inventing new analysis routes.
stage_lock.latest_evidence: scripts/audit_stage5_upload_flow_parity.py passes across all six frozen contract operations, and the Stage 5 frontend scaffold includes the MLCI public trajectory workflow.
stage_lock.name: Frontend
stage_lock.scope_rule: Build only frontend behavior that consumes the frozen Stage 4 contract and preserves parameter inspection plus CLI reproducibility.

gate: Wheel and source distribution install cleanly.
Documentation builds cleanly.
Examples run from scratch.
Release archive contains no private data, manuscript-private files, raw microscopy, or local paths.
stage_lock.name: Official software release
stage_lock.scope_rule: Do not call RhoDyn professionally citable until PyPI, Docker, Zenodo, docs, citation metadata, CI, and release hygiene pass together.

gate: Formal method definition and mathematical model are complete.
Benchmarks cover amplitude-only, endpoint-only, threshold-only, and generic time-series summaries.
At least two independent biological demonstrations beyond the original manuscript logic are in place.
Software implementation, uncertainty handling, tutorials, GUI or hosted demo, and limitations section are ready.
stage_lock.name: Nature Methods first
stage_lock.scope_rule: Treat this as a future scientific-methods campaign, not a rebranding of the RhoA/microglia manuscript or the Stage 3 examples.

gate: Open-core library, CLI, public adapters, examples, and basic reports remain useful without paid features.
Paid or hosted features add collaboration, private data, batch jobs, richer dashboards, export logs, adapters, and deployments without changing scientific claims.
Commercial positioning remains dynamic operating-state interpretation for live-cell perturbation data.
stage_lock.name: Product and commercial alignment
stage_lock.scope_rule: Product strategy inherits the Nature Methods framing and must not lead the scientific evidence path.
